extension.description: VSCode extension for importing translations into Weblate
configuration.serverUrl.description: Base URL of the Weblate server (for example: https://weblate.example.com)
configuration.defaultLanguage.descriptio: Required default language code. The CSV must contain this column; it is the source language for keys and the only language that creates keys via POST (for example: pt_BR)
command.importTranslations.title: Fastlate: Import Translations
command.configureToken.title: Fastlate: Configure Token
command.removeToken.title: Fastlate: Remove Token
view.sidebar.name: Import Translations
